title: ServiceGroup
description: An IAM service group that organizes services for access control.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service group.

name.description: The name of the service group.

description.description: A description of the service group.

services_count.description: The number of services in the group.

created_at.description: The date and time the service group was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the service group was last updated.
